result.stdout:
Usage: AITSYS.ChangelogGenerator.exe [options]
Options:
  --help, -h               Show this help message.
  --path, -r PATH          Path to the repository.
  --after, -a SHA          Commits after this SHA (optional).
  --before, -b SHA         Commits before this SHA (optional).
  --output, -o PATH        Write changes to file (optional).
